_comment: OPTIONAL. Copy to ~/.claude/brain/aliases.json to merge fragmented project names into one canonical project. Each key is the canonical name; its array lists the raw project names (as shown by `brain-rag list` / list_projects) that should fold into it. Absent or malformed => no aliasing (identity). It affects list_projects, search filtering, and get_state/save_state (which read/write state/<canonical>.md). Do NOT merge in a project whose sessions are off-topic (e.g. a tool built inside another repo's workspace) — that re-introduces contamination.
